title: geranium spathulatum var. affine
intro: Geranium spathulatum var. affine, also known as the coastal geranium, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family and is native to the Pacific coast of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Geranium spathulatum var. affine include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce anxiety and stress, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
